## Summary

- 

## Validation

- [ ] Conventional commit subjects follow `type(scope): lowercase description`.
- [ ] EditMode tests were run or the reason is documented.
- [ ] PlayMode tests were run or the reason is documented.
- [ ] Unity serialization risks were reviewed when scenes, prefabs or ScriptableObjects changed.
- [ ] No secrets, generated IDE files or local machine paths were added.

## Unity Scope

- [ ] Runtime code
- [ ] Editor tooling
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation or repository hygiene only

## Notes

Add reviewer context, known limitations or manual Unity Editor checks here.
